summary: Specifies Certificate Transparency logs, including the precise binary Merkle Tree Hash construction over SHA-256 with distinct leaf (0x00) and interior-node (0x01) prefixes, and the recursive algorithms for Merkle audit paths (inclusion proofs) and consistency proofs against a signed tree head. This is the de facto reference definition of SHA-256 Merkle inclusion proofs used by deployed CT logs. Experimental status; obsoleted by RFC 9162 (CT 2.0), which retains the same tree and proof definitions.
title: Certificate Transparency
